title: realtimerail.nyc
author: James Fennell
description: A clean, user-centric web app displaying NYC subway arrival times using real-time MTA data with no tracking or ads.

title: Brand New Subway
author: Jason Wright
description: An interactive transportation planning game that lets players redesign the entire NYC subway system from scratch.

title: SubwayNow
author: @blahblahblah-
description: Live NYC subway route maps with delay detection and headway analysis, powering both web and lite versions.

title: NYC Interactive 3D Buildings
author: NYC Planning
description: An interactive WebGL visualization of all Manhattan buildings in 3D using real NYC data.

title: NYC Citi Bike Interactive Map
author: Community Developer
description: Leaflet.js visualization of 750+ Citi Bike stations with usage pattern analysis and density mapping.

title: NYC Train Sign LED Matrix
author: Community Developer
description: Raspberry Pi LED matrix display showing real-time NYC subway arrival times using MTA GTFS data.

title: NYC Streets Official Map
author: NYC Planning
description: Interactive official city map showing street locations, dimensions, parks, and public easements.

title: Pete Wells 100 Best NYC Restaurants Map
author: Raja Hamid
description: Interactive map visualizing NY Times restaurant critic Pete Wells' top 100 NYC restaurants for 2024.

title: NYC Migration Data Visualization
author: NYC Planning Labs
description: Single-page interactive visualization exploring historic U.S. Census migration data for NYC using D3.js.

title: NYC Food Map Collection
author: Mommy Gearest
description: Curated interactive map featuring 80+ restaurants, bars, and bakeries across Manhattan and Brooklyn.

title: NYC Housing Data Database
author: Community Developer
description: Comprehensive database of NYC housing information using Python and PostgreSQL with open civic data.

title: NYC Subway Data Analysis
author: Todd W. Schneider
description: Real-time GTFS feed collector and analyzer for NYC subway data with comprehensive ridership insights.

title: Creative Coding NYC Community
author: Creative Coding NYC
description: NYC meetup group bringing together makers to share and discuss creative coding projects and art-tech intersections.
